Kumar
ABOUT ME
1. Skilled java Developer with 6+ years of experience in software development using java technologies.
2. Working experience in in Java, Spring Boot, Hibernate, Microservices, Spring Data JPA, Spring Security,
Restful API.
3. Good Understanding of different Phases of project lifecycle, Involved in design-Development-Testing.

5. Excellent team player, proactive, follows process takes responsibility and delivers on commitments.

9. Excellent communication skills, analytical skills and interpersonal skills with ability to work independently.

WORK EXPERIENCE
TECHNICAL LEAD

PCS is transforming and humanizing care through innovation solution that enable better health. It is a application
which analyze the data of patient and shows in the UI

• Configured Hibernate with Spring.
• Implemented backend validation using spring boot.
• Worked on spring-security to secure the functionality.
• Handling transaction management and session using spring framework.
• Used collections and multithreading concept for more reliable application with JDBC for access of data from
database.
• Create SQL Queries to get data from database tables.
• Bug Fixes and performance improvements.
• Revised and modularized and update old code base to modern development standard, reducing operating
costs.
• Did testing with Junit and Mockito for application functionality testing purpose.
• Code review and unit testing.

transcript.question: Can you explain how Java handles memory management?
transcript.answer: Java uses JVM memory areas like heap and stack. Objects are stored in the heap and garbage collection automatically frees unused objects. JVM uses collectors like G1GC to optimize memory management.

weaknesses: Could elaborate more on different memory areas
evaluation.feedback: Good technical understanding of Java memory management fundamentals

transcript.question: How does Spring Boot simplify application development?
transcript.answer: Spring Boot eliminates boilerplate configuration by using auto-configuration and starter dependencies. It also includes embedded servers like Tomcat, so applications can run independently without external deployment.

weaknesses: Could mention more Spring Boot features
evaluation.feedback: Strong grasp of Spring Boot's core benefits

transcript.question: How have you used Kafka in your projects?
transcript.answer: I used Kafka as an event streaming platform for microservices communication. Producers publish events to topics and consumers process them asynchronously. We used consumer groups for scalability and fault tolerance.

transcript.question: What are key principles of Microservices architecture?
transcript.answer: Microservices should be loosely coupled, independently deployable, and communicate via APIs or messaging systems like Kafka. Each service should have its own database to maintain autonomy.

transcript.question: How does Kubernetes help in deploying microservices?
transcript.answer: Kubernetes manages containerized applications using pods and deployments. It handles scaling, service discovery, rolling updates, and self-healing of containers.

transcript.question: What AWS services have you used?
transcript.answer: I have used EC2 for compute, S3 for object storage, RDS for managed databases, and EKS for Kubernetes deployments. We also used CloudWatch for monitoring.

evaluation.feedback: Good breadth of AWS service knowledge

Technical Skills:
Programming Languages: Java, JDK
Frameworks: Spring Boot, Spring MVC, JDBCTemplate, JOOQ, Apache Kafka
Databases: MySQL, PostgreSQL, Redis, MongoDB
Tools & Technologies: RESTful APIs, Microservices, Docker, Kubernetes, RabbitMQ
Load Balancers & API Gateways: NGINX, Zuul, Spring Cloud Gateway
Version Control: Git, GitHub, Gerrit
Cloud Platforms: AWS (EC2, RDS, S3), Azure, GCP
Testing Tools: JUnit, Mockito, Postman, JMeter
Methodologies: Agile, Scrum, TDD, CI/CD
Projects:
FACT - Remote System Image monitoring
 Designed REST APIs to read OS images and report missing sectors, used JSON and XML for data
interchange.
 Integrated and modified IBM RTC APIs to specifically suit the need of the project. Wrote services to
handle multiple concurrent connection requests to the tune of few thousands.
 Designed login and signup strategies to keep user session active on multiple devices simultaneously.
 Implemented file compression strategies using 7zip, created APIs to transfer files and across multiple
individual modules of the project.
 Implemented mailing system and APIs to send and receive custom emails containing the status report of
the file analysis – related to the project.
 Used MQTT for messaging layer, to communicate between different microservices, used Apache Kafka for
stream processing (reading OS image data and sending it to a different service for analysis)
 Optimized API response times through caching mechanisms (Redis), resulting in a 50% decrease in
latency. Utilized Docker containers for service deployment, ensuring consistent environments across
development and production.
Technologies Used: Java8/Java11, Spring Boot, Spring Security, JDBCTemplate, PostgresSQL, Redis
File Sync Application/Remote File Storage
 Developed microservices to upload and sync file to a remote server using Java
 Integrated Dropbox and Google cloud storage APIs to get access to third party file hosting services.
 Used AMQP and a combination of MQTT for push notifications and broadcasting various status messages.
 Implemented strategies to hash the uploaded files and encrypt certain file types based on SHA256 and
bcrypt hashing algorithms
 Used elastic search for file search and document search feature.
 Used MongoDB for handling unstructured data, created API gateways for handling multiple requests.
 Used NginX for reverse proxy, handled system authorization using root signed certificates, devised various
strategies for cron-job tasks.
 Used various Agile methodologies, including SCRUM, Test-Driven Development (TDD), and Pair
Programming, contributing to streamlined and efficient development workflows.
 Designed and implemented RESTful APIs for legacy applications, enhancing modularity and independence,
thereby ensuring seamless integration with modern technologies.
 Ensured compliance with security standards (e.g., OAuth 2.0, JWT) for user authentication and data
protection. Developed a comprehensive logging system using SLF4J and Logstash for error tracking and
performance monitoring.
 Implemented data validation and error handling strategies to improve API reliability. Participated in Agile
ceremonies, contributing to sprint planning and retrospectives to enhance team performance.
Maintained API documentation using Swagger for improved developer experience.
 Integrated RabbitMQ for asynchronous processing of transaction notifications, improving system
responsiveness and reliability. Conducted performance optimization using SQL query tuning and indexing
strategies, resulting in a 40% increase in data retrieval speeds.
Technologies Used: Java11, MongoDB, MySQL, AMQP, NginX, OAuth, Spring Security
HMI Analytics application
 Implemented ETL pipelines to gather multiple vehicle telemetry data from different sensor types and
from different vehicle vendors, processing millions of data per day enabling proper parsing and storage of
data.
 Designed and implemented multiple microservices to collect different types of vehicle and hardware info,
enabling applications to derive thousands of interfaces daily.
 Integrated CI/CD pipelines, Revamped legacy systems using Java and Spring Boot, improving system
performance, streamlined codebase with agile development, boosting productivity, managed and
mentored a team of junior developers, increasing overall proficiency.
 Designed and implemented a generic library for user management helping both internal and external
projects quickly integrate mechanisms like authentication, authorisation, user registration, login, roles
and permissions cutting the overall development time by 50% and improving developer productivity.
 Implemented automated report generation system which gave insights about system status and load on
different services which are currently being used by the system.
 Integrated Spring Security for role-based access control, enhancing application security. Conducted
performance testing using JMeter, identifying bottlenecks and optimizing query performance.
Collaborated with front-end teams to ensure seamless integration of APIs with Angular and React
applications.
Technologies Used: Java11, Spring Boot, Spring Security, Spring Cloud Gateway, RabbitMQ, Swagger
Education
M.Sc. (Software Technology), 2016
College: AIMIT, St Aloysius College, Mangalore, KA, India (Mangalore University)
BCA (Bachelor of Computer Application), 2012
College: Mangalore University, Mangalore, KA, India
